prompt:
Cute Chinese WeChat sticker pack style, single centered full-body mascot, clean white background, no text, no letters, no logo.

Character: white_mochi, a pure warm-white round mochi blob with a tiny green sprout on top, soft rounded body, tiny short arms, tiny short feet, small black dot eyes, tiny cute mouth, large soft pink oval blush cheeks.

Pose: sitting sleepily under a small pastel blue blanket, eyes gently closed, peaceful goodnight expression, one tiny hand holding the blanket edge.

Style: flat 2D hand-drawn sticker, thin clean dark brown outline, soft pastel colors, minimal details, same line weight, same blush style, same eye design, same head-body proportion as the sticker pack. Single character only. No second character. No pet. No background story. No realistic texture. No 3D. No anime.
